title: UN leads call to prepare ‘for when digital systems fail’
content: It can be annoying when the wifi signal is cut, but what about if everything digital we rely on were to crash suddenly – from satellites to life-support systems in hospitals?

title: Nearly 5 million children are still dying annually before their fifth birthday: Here’s why

title: GDP up, satisfaction down: Why we need a new way to measure progress
content: For decades, Gross Domestic Product (GDP) has been used as a benchmark of society’s progress. Yet, as the GDP figures keep ticking up, so too does a profound disenchantment with the political and economic systems tasked with serving the public. Is it time to find a new way to measure what really matters?
